landing_subheading: All-in-one management software to streamline your fitness business operations and boost member engagement.
hero_description: All-in-one platform to manage members, schedule classes, track progress, and grow your business.
dashboard_description: A powerful, intuitive dashboard designed for modern fitness businesses
features_title: Everything you need to run your business
features_description: Powerful tools designed specifically for fitness professionals
feature_members_description: Keep track of all your members, their memberships, attendance history, and progress. View detailed profiles, manage payments, and communicate directly from one central dashboard.
feature_members_benefit_1_desc: Photos, contact info, emergency contacts, and medical notes
feature_members_benefit_2_desc: QR code check-ins and real-time capacity monitoring
feature_members_benefit_3_desc: Track subscriptions, process payments, and manage renewals
feature_scheduling_description: Create and manage classes with ease. Members can book online, receive automatic reminders, and join waitlists when classes are full.
feature_scheduling_benefit_1_desc: Easily create and adjust class schedules
feature_scheduling_benefit_2_desc: SMS and email notifications before classes
feature_scheduling_benefit_3_desc: Automatically fill spots when members cancel
feature_analytics_description: Get real-time analytics and detailed reports about your business performance. Track revenue, member growth, class popularity, and more.
feature_analytics_benefit_1_desc: Monitor income, subscriptions, and payment trends
feature_analytics_benefit_2_desc: Identify at-risk members and track engagement
feature_analytics_benefit_3_desc: Generate detailed reports for any time period
feature_mobile_description: Native mobile apps for iOS and Android. Your members can book classes, track their progress, and stay connected wherever they are.
feature_mobile_benefit_1_desc: Members can reserve their spot in seconds
feature_mobile_benefit_2_desc: Log exercises, track progress, and view history
feature_mobile_benefit_3_desc: Keep members engaged with timely updates
overview_description: Powerful features designed for modern fitness businesses
overview_members_desc: Track memberships, attendance, and member progress all in one place.
overview_scheduling_desc: Easy booking system with automated reminders and waitlists.
overview_analytics_desc: Detailed insights to help you make data-driven decisions.
waitlist_title: Be the first to experience BetterFit
waitlist_description: Join our waitlist to get early access, exclusive launch pricing, and be notified when we go live.
form_success: Success! Check your email for confirmation.
form_privacy: By joining, you'll receive updates about our launch. We respect your privacy and won't spam you.
benefits_title: What you'll get as an early member:
benefit_1: Early access to the platform before public launch
benefit_2: Exclusive launch pricing locked in for life
benefit_4: Influence the roadmap by sharing your feedback
about_description: We've walked in your shoes. BetterFit was born from real-world experience managing fitness businesses. We know the challenges you face and built the solution we wished existed—powerful yet simple, comprehensive yet intuitive.
footer_brand_tagline: The modern management platform for fitness businesses. Coming soon.
